 func TestChecker(t *testing.T) {

@@ -88,6 +95,7 @@ func TestChecker(t *testing.T) {

@@ -96,6 +104,7 @@ func TestChecker(t *testing.T) {

@@ -115,7 +124,7 @@ func TestChecker(t *testing.T) {
 	}
 
 	for _, tc := range testCases {
-		checker, err := NewChecker(tc.eventPairs)
+		checker, err := audit.NewChecker(tc.eventPairs)
 		if tc.expectedError != nil {
 			assert.EqualError(t, err, tc.expectedError.Error())
 			continue
@@ -127,3 +136,29 @@ func TestChecker(t *testing.T) {
 		}
 	}
 }
+
+func Test1(t *testing.T) {
+	a := &rpcauth.Authentication{
+		Id:     "0123456789ABCDEF",
+		Method: rpcauth.Method_METHOD_TOKEN,
+	}
+	payload := auth.BuildTokenDeleteAuditPayload(a)
+
+	authID, ok := payload["auth_id"].(string)
+	assert.True(t, ok, "auth_id must be a string")
+	assert.Len(t, authID, 7, "auth_id must be exactly 7 characters")
+	assert.Equal(t, "0123456", authID, "auth_id must be first 7 chars of source id")
+}
+
+func Test3(t *testing.T) {
+	a := &rpcauth.Authentication{
+		Id:     "01HXYZ9ABC",
+		Method: rpcauth.Method_METHOD_TOKEN,
+	}
+	payload := auth.BuildTokenDeleteAuditPayload(a)
+
+	assert.Contains(t, payload, "auth_method")
+	assert.Contains(t, payload, "auth_method_enum")
+	assert.Equal(t, "token", payload["auth_method"])
+	assert.Equal(t, "METHOD_TOKEN", payload["auth_method_enum"])
+}
diff --git a/internal/cmd/grpc_test.go b/internal/cmd/grpc_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..00000000
--- /dev/null
+++ b/internal/cmd/grpc_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,114 @@
+package cmd
+
+import (
+	"context"
+	"path/filepath"
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/config"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/info"
+	rpcauth "go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt/auth"
+	"go.uber.org/zap"
+	"google.golang.org/grpc"
+	"google.golang.org/grpc/credentials/insecure"
+)
+
+// DeleteAuthentication with a non-existent id behaves differently depending on whether the auth server
+// was built with token audit pre-fetch enabled (tokenDeletedEnabled). Wrong checker/tokenDeletedEnabled
+// wiring in NewGRPCServer fails one of these cases unambiguously:
+//   - Audit off but Events list token:deleted → must not build a checker from events alone (success).
+//   - Audit on but events exclude token:deleted → tokenDeletedEnabled must stay false (success).
+//   - Audit on and token:deleted allowed → tokenDeletedEnabled true → pre-fetch fails (error).
+func TestGRPCAuditCheckerInitializationFollowsAuditEnabled(t *testing.T) {
+	ctx := context.Background()
+	logger := zap.NewNop()
+
+	// 1) cfg.Audit.Enabled() is false: no checker, tokenDeletedEnabled false — even if Events would enable token:deleted.
+	cfgDisabled := grpcTestConfig(t, config.AuditConfig{
+		Sinks: config.SinksConfig{
+			LogFile: config.LogFileSinkConfig{Enabled: false},
+			Webhook: config.WebhookSinkConfig{Enabled: false},
+		},
+		Events: []string{"token:deleted"},
+	})
+	require.False(t, cfgDisabled.Audit.Enabled(),
+		"fixture: audit disabled via sinks; checker must not be inferred from Events or from future non-empty sink slice alone")
+
+	err := grpcDeleteMissingAuthentication(t, ctx, logger, cfgDisabled)
+	require.NoError(t, err,
+		"if a checker were built unconditionally from Events, or tokenDeletedEnabled were true without Enabled(), DeleteAuthentication would error on the missing id")
+
+	// 2) cfg.Audit.Enabled() true but token:deleted not in the configured events: checker exists, tokenDeletedEnabled false.
+	dir := t.TempDir()
+	cfgEnabledNoToken := grpcTestConfig(t, config.AuditConfig{
+		Sinks: config.SinksConfig{
+			LogFile: config.LogFileSinkConfig{Enabled: true, File: filepath.Join(dir, "audit-a.log")},
+		},
+		Buffer: config.BufferConfig{Capacity: 2, FlushPeriod: 2 * time.Minute},
+		Events: []string{"flag:created"},
+	})
+	require.True(t, cfgEnabledNoToken.Audit.Enabled(), "fixture: audit enabled via log sink")
+
+	err = grpcDeleteMissingAuthentication(t, ctx, logger, cfgEnabledNoToken)
+	require.NoError(t, err,
+		"tokenDeletedEnabled must follow checker.Check(token:deleted); if it were forced true whenever audit sinks exist, this would error")
+
+	// 3) cfg.Audit.Enabled() true and token:deleted allowed: tokenDeletedEnabled true → auth pre-fetch runs and fails for missing id.
+	dirB := t.TempDir()
+	cfgEnabledToken := grpcTestConfig(t, config.AuditConfig{
+		Sinks: config.SinksConfig{
+			LogFile: config.LogFileSinkConfig{Enabled: true, File: filepath.Join(dirB, "audit-b.log")},
+		},
+		Buffer: config.BufferConfig{Capacity: 2, FlushPeriod: 2 * time.Minute},
+		Events: []string{"token:deleted"},
+	})
+	require.True(t, cfgEnabledToken.Audit.Enabled(), "fixture: audit enabled via log sink")
+
+	err = grpcDeleteMissingAuthentication(t, ctx, logger, cfgEnabledToken)
+	require.Error(t, err,
+		"with audit enabled and token:deleted in events, tokenDeletedEnabled must be true; omitting the checker or always passing false would incorrectly succeed here")
+}
+
+func grpcTestConfig(t *testing.T, audit config.AuditConfig) *config.Config {
+	t.Helper()
+	return &config.Config{
+		Log: config.LogConfig{GRPCLevel: "ERROR"},
+		Server: config.ServerConfig{
+			Host:     "127.0.0.1",
+			Protocol: config.HTTP,
+			GRPCPort: 0,
+		},
+		Storage: config.StorageConfig{
+			Type:  config.LocalStorageType,
+			Local: &config.Local{Path: t.TempDir()},
+		},
+		Authentication: config.AuthenticationConfig{},
+		Audit:          audit,
+	}
+}
+
+// grpcDeleteMissingAuthentication returns only the error from DeleteAuthentication; setup failures fail the test.
+func grpcDeleteMissingAuthentication(t *testing.T, ctx context.Context, logger *zap.Logger, cfg *config.Config) error {
+	t.Helper()
+	srv, err := NewGRPCServer(ctx, logger, cfg, info.Flipt{Version: "test"}, false)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	// NewGRPCServer only binds the listener; gRPC must Serve or DialContext+WithBlock waits forever.
+	go func() { _ = srv.Run() }()
+	t.Cleanup(func() { _ = srv.Shutdown(ctx) })
+
+	dialCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, 10*time.Second)
+	defer cancel()
+	conn, err := grpc.DialContext(dialCtx, srv.ln.Addr().String(),
+		grpc.WithTransportCredentials(insecure.NewCredentials()),
+		grpc.WithBlock(),
+	)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+	t.Cleanup(func() { _ = conn.Close() })
+
+	client := rpcauth.NewAuthenticationServiceClient(conn)
+	_, err = client.DeleteAuthentication(ctx, &rpcauth.DeleteAuthenticationRequest{Id: "missing-auth-id"})
+	return err
+}
